Terms of Authority

Last updated: July 4, 2026

Welcome to the Bizkitgrow platform. By initializing or accessing our autonomous systems, local search optimization tools, or network provisioning APIs, you agree to comply with the terms of authority defined herein.

1. Scope of Operations

Bizkitgrow provides B2B automated growth infrastructure, including but not limited to local coordinate reputation tracking, programmatic network access profiles, and automated marketing syndication endpoints. All usage must remain within standard commercial parameters and comply with local jurisdiction directives.

2. Account Credentials & Security

You are solely responsible for protecting credential access profiles associated with your system endpoint. Bizkitgrow is not liable for unauthorized network manipulation stemming from weak perimeter keys or shared operational sessions.

3. Data & Intellectual Property

All templates, UX configurations, and structural optimization engines remain the exclusive property of Bizkitgrow or its licensing partners. User-generated content pushed through our syndication engine remains your intellectual asset, though you grant us the routing license required for delivery.
